body.code:
plot(data)1
A code-generated figure with an annotation overlay.
body.p: Plain SVG code block in caption should not become overlay:
body.code:
plot(other_data)2
<svg viewBox="0 0 10 10" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <circle cx="5" cy="5" r="4" /> </svg>
A figure whose caption includes an SVG example, not an overlay.
